caption: In a brightly lit classroom or lecture hall, a group of people are gathered around a table in front of a projected screen. Two men in black t-shirts stand behind the table, interacting with items on its surface. A woman wearing a black dress walks past them toward the right side of the room. In the foreground, several audience members sit in chairs facing the front; one man wears a yellow shirt, and another wears a black t-shirt with a white circular logo and the text "THE SPIRIT OF THE GAME". As the sequence progresses, the woman in the black dress moves closer to the men at the table and eventually stands between them. Some audience members shift their positions, including one man who rests his head on his hand. The projection screen displays text, though the specific words are not legible.
